interpretation.next_step: Run a full same-seed checkpoint eval with target refresh, motion-state rewrite, and action-offset alignment if both candidate improvement checks pass; otherwise repair reset/action semantics further.

scope: Live IsaacLab diagnostic comparing reset target refresh, motion-state rewrite, action-history reset, and joint-action offset alignment under zero and checkpoint-policy first-step actions.

interpretation.why_this_matters: The current local PPO teacher is limited by reset/termination behavior. This probe tests whether aligning the joint-position action offset to the rewritten motion state reduces the first-step transient after no-advance target refresh.

worker_metrics.scope: Live IsaacLab reset/state/action consistency probe for robot-order FK tracking.
